title: Turn pack starter templates into a scaffold command surface
summary: Adds an operator-facing scaffold path that renders the hosted-pack starter templates into a validated pack skeleton.
scope_items: Create a scaffold command that materializes hosted-pack starter templates into a target root.
Validate scaffold output against shared pack contract expectations and template guidance.
done_when_items: A scaffold command can emit a new pack skeleton from governed starter templates.
The scaffolded output validates cleanly against the shared hosted-pack contract.
